if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND m.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND m.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyRoleMenu :: selectById */ m.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_role_menu m LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = m.site_id WHERE m.role_menu_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyRoleMenu :: selectList */ m.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_role_menu m LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = m.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyRoleMenu :: selectPageList */ m.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_role_menu m LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = m.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(m.*) /* base.sy :: SyRoleMenu :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_role_menu m
